339 J0500A_PAIN_EFCT_SLEEP_CD J0500A_PAIN_EFCT_SLEEP_CD J0500A Pain Assessment Interview: Pain Effect Sleep Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident experienced difficulty sleeping at night because of pain or hurting in the last five days.
